reason: This is a benign evening greeting/prayer in Arabic that translates to 'May your evening be filled with comfort embracing happiness, to make us reassured at the beginning of a new evening. With You [Allah] we enter our evening.' Contains no ISIS-related content or extremist ideology.
original_post: “مَسائكم إرتيـاح يضُـم أطياف السعاده ، لـِ يجعلنا مطمئنـين بـِ بداية مساء جديد , وبِك امسينـا يَ الله.”
